_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of holistic TTP, employment of innovative approaches, and transcending challenges that face the operational mission.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.503), TF-A-004 (TF, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.590). Shared vocabulary: [approaches]. DCWF-only terms [challenges, employment, face, holistic, innovative, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, engineering, findings, methods, novel, operationalize] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.870, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of holistic TTP, employment of innovative approaches, and transcending" and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.549 ≈ STS 0.590 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [approaches] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Shared tokens: [approaches]. DCWF-only: [challenges, employment, face, holistic, innovative, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, engineering, findings, methods, novel, operationalize].
